question: A website tracks average sign-ups per year. Based on the chart, which statement is most appropriate?

options.A: The latest year clearly shows that sign-ups are now on a permanent downward trend.
options.B: The latest year’s sign-ups have dropped sharply compared with the previous years.
options.C: Because the latest year only includes data up to Apr 01, 2024, the full-year trend for that year cannot be determined from this chart.
options.D: The latest year has had the lowest sign-ups of any full year shown.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 2 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (190 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 988 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
